channel.title: Breath of the Wild 2 on The Gamer's Hollow
channel.description: Recent content in Breath of the Wild 2 on The Gamer's Hollow

item.title: Zeldas 35th Anniversary Thoughts (Breath of The Wild 2?)
item.description: so I thought I would talk about this since 2021 marks the 35th anniversary of Zelda. I will be talking about mostly breath of the wild 2 thoughts of what will be in the game. and a in-depth trailer review. [youtube https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3fr1Z07AV00 ] above is the official Nintendo trailer for The Legends Of Zelda Breath Of The Wild 2 (this was announced at E3 2019 and it is now January 2021.
